text: CENTCOM: Since commencement of the blockade, 23 ships have complied with direction from U.S. forces to turn around.
text_zh: 中央司令部：自封锁开始以来，已有23艘船只听从美军指示掉头离开。

text: 🔄 Forwarded from ResistanceTrench mirror: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei Issues Strong Message on Iran Army Day Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei, Supreme Leader of Iran, issued a message marking the anniversary of the Islamic Republic of Iran’s Army, emphasizing military strength, national unity, and continued resistance against enemies. He stated that the 1979 Islamic Revolution transformed the army from a force tied to the Pahlavi regime into a people-based institution, describing it as “a child of the nation.” He highlighted the army’s role in confronting the United States, Israel, and separatist groups, stressing that Iran’s armed forces remain strong, unified, and capable. He also pointed to advancements in drone and naval capabilities. The message commemorated a martyred leader who played a key role in preserving and strengthening the army in the early years after the revolution. Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei concluded by calling for further development of military capabilities and paid tribute to fallen commanders, soldiers, and their families.
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 ResistanceTrench 镜像：🇮🇷 ⚡️ 阿亚图拉穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊在伊朗建军节发表强硬讲话。伊朗最高领袖阿亚图拉穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊发表讲话，纪念伊朗伊斯兰共和国建军节，强调了军事实力、民族团结以及对敌人的持续抵抗。他指出，1979年的伊斯兰革命将军队从一支依附于巴列维政权的武装力量转变为以人民为基础的机构，称其为“民族之子”。他强调了军队在对抗美国、以色列和分裂主义团体中的作用，并强调伊朗武装力量依然强大、团结且有能力。他还提到了无人机和海军能力的进步。此次讲话纪念了一位在革命后初期为维护和加强军队发挥关键作用的烈士领导人。阿亚图拉穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊最后呼吁进一步发展军事能力，并向阵亡的指挥官、士兵及其家属致敬。

text: 🇷🇺 ⚔️ 🇺🇦 Lavrov on Russia-Ukraine negotiations. At the last Istanbul meeting in July, Russia proposed raising delegation levels and forming three working groups on humanitarian, military, and political issues. Ukraine had complained the talks were too narrow. Russia gave them what they asked for. Kiev waited until November, then said they weren't interested. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 ⚔️ 🇺🇦 拉夫罗夫谈俄乌谈判。在7月的最后一次伊斯坦布尔会议上，俄罗斯提议提高代表团级别，并就人道主义、军事和政治问题成立三个工作组。乌克兰曾抱怨谈判范围太窄。俄罗斯满足了他们的要求。基辅一直等到11月，然后说他们没兴趣了。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei Issues Strong Message on Iran Army Day Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei, Supreme Leader of Iran, issued a message marking the anniversary of the Islamic Republic of Iran’s Army, emphasizing military strength, national unity, and continued resistance against enemies. He stated that the 1979 Islamic Revolution transformed the army from a force tied to the Pahlavi regime into a people-based institution, describing it as “a child of the nation.” He highlighted the army’s role in confronting the United States, Israel, and separatist groups, stressing that Iran’s armed forces remain strong, unified, and capable. He also pointed to advancements in drone and naval capabilities. The message commemorated a martyred leader who played a key role in preserving and strengthening the army in the early years after the revolution. Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei concluded by calling for further development of military capabilities and paid tribute to fallen commanders, soldiers, and their families.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 阿亚图拉穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊在伊朗建军节发表强硬讲话。伊朗最高领袖阿亚图拉穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊发表讲话，纪念伊朗伊斯兰共和国建军节，强调了军事实力、民族团结以及对敌人的持续抵抗。他指出，1979年的伊斯兰革命将军队从一支依附于巴列维政权的武装力量转变为以人民为基础的机构，称其为“民族之子”。他强调了军队在对抗美国、以色列和分裂主义团体中的作用，并强调伊朗武装力量依然强大、团结且有能力。他还提到了无人机和海军能力的进步。此次讲话纪念了一位在革命后初期为维护和加强军队发挥关键作用的烈士领导人。阿亚图拉穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊最后呼吁进一步发展军事能力，并向阵亡的指挥官、士兵及其家属致敬。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇳🇮🇷🇮🇶 AP: Two Indian vessels have reversed course in the Strait of Hormuz following reports of gunfire from Iran’s Revolutionary Guard. The ships include an Indian‑flagged supertanker carrying two million barrels of Iraqi oil. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇳 TankerTrackers: A recording from a merchant tanker, the Sanmar Herald, captures the crew pleading with Iranian Sepah Navy forces after being given clearance to transit the Strait of Hormuz. “You gave me clearance to go! You are firing now! Let me turn back,” the crew member says. The vessel had reportedly been cleared to pass but came under fire. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇳🇮🇷🇮🇶 美联社：在收到伊朗革命卫队开火的报告后，两艘印度船只在霍尔木兹海峡掉头。这些船只包括一艘悬挂印度国旗、载有200万桶伊拉克石油的超级油轮。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇳 TankerTrackers：一段来自商用油轮“Sanmar Herald”号的录音记录了船员在获得通过霍尔木兹海峡的许可后，恳求伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军的情景。“你们给了我通行许可！你们现在开火了！让我掉头，”船员说。据报道，该船此前已获准通行，但随后遭到射击。 @wfwitness

text: Jordan Bardella, leader of France’s far-right party National Rally: Trump’s war objectives are erratic, and good luck to anyone trying to find any coherence in them.
text_zh: 法国极右翼政党“国民联盟”领导人若尔当·巴尔代拉：特朗普的战争目标反复无常，谁要是想从中找出逻辑连贯性，那祝他好运。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 WSJ: The U.S. military is tracking Iranian attacks on two non‑US vessels, a senior US official said. According to the vessels’ masters, the Iranian boats did not issue a VHF radio challenge before opening fire. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇳 🇮🇷 🇮🇶 AP : Two Indian vessels have reversed course in the Strait of Hormuz following reports of gunfire from Iran’s Revolutionary Guard. The ships include an Indian‑flagged supertanker carrying two million barrels of Iraqi oil. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 华尔街日报：一位美国高级官员表示，美军正在追踪伊朗对两艘非美国船只的袭击。据船长称，伊朗船只在开火前并未发出甚高频（VHF）无线电警告。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇳 🇮🇷 🇮🇶 美联社：在收到伊朗革命卫队开火的报告后，两艘印度船只在霍尔木兹海峡掉头。这些船只包括一艘悬挂印度国旗、载有200万桶伊拉克石油的超级油轮。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iranian state broadcaster reminded those urging Tehran to follow international law that on 29 February 2026 – right in the middle of talks – the United States assassinated Iran’s top political and religious leader, along with several senior military officials. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗国家广播公司提醒那些敦促德黑兰遵守国际法的人，在2026年2月29日——谈判正进行时——美国暗杀了伊朗最高政治和宗教领袖，以及几名高级军事官员。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. CENTCOM: Since the blockade began, 23 ships have complied with U.S. orders to turn around. AH‑64 Apache helicopters are flying above the Strait of Hormuz, providing a visible presence in support of freedom of navigation. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国中央司令部：自封锁开始以来，已有23艘船只听从美国命令掉头离开。AH-64阿帕奇直升机正在霍尔木兹海峡上空飞行，提供可见的存在感以支持航行自由。 @wfwitness

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ‼️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 Ukraine’s Security Service (SBU) conducted an operation in Crimea: ▪️ Three Russian vessels, a radar station, and logistical facilities were damaged. ▪️ The strike reportedly targeted the large landing ships Yamal and Azov, as well as another vessel (type unspecified). A Grachonok-class patrol boat was also likely damaged. ▪️ Drones hit the antennas of the Delfin system, the Mys-M1 radar station, and fuel storage tanks at an oil depot. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231：‼️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 乌克兰国家安全局（SBU）在克里米亚开展了一次行动：▪️ 三艘俄罗斯船只、一个雷达站和后勤设施受损。▪️ 据报道，袭击目标是大型登陆舰“亚马尔”号和“亚速”号，以及另一艘船只（型号未详）。一艘“Grachonok”级巡逻艇也可能受损。▪️ 无人机击中了“Delfin”系统的天线、“Mys-M1”雷达站以及一个油库的储油罐。与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: U.S. Central Command AH-64 Apaches fly above the Strait of Hormuz during a patrol, April 17. U.S. Army Soldiers are flying in and around the strait providing a visible presence in support of freedom of navigation. https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2045468301799645569/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部AH-64阿帕奇直升机于4月17日在巡逻期间飞越霍尔木兹海峡。美国陆军士兵正在海峡及其周边飞行，提供可见的存在感以支持航行自由。https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2045468301799645569/photo/1 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @TankerTrackers : According to two Channel 16 audio recordings captured today, two Indian vessels were forced back west out of the Strait of Hormuz by Iran's Sepah (IRGC) Navy. Firing was involved. One of the vessels is an Indian-flagged VLCC supertanker carrying 2 million barrels of Iraqi oil. Meanwhile, India is still importing Iranian oil. With friends like these..... #OOTT #Tankers #IranWar tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转发 @TankerTrackers：根据今天捕获的两段16频道音频记录，两艘印度船只被伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）海军强行赶出霍尔木兹海峡以西。过程中涉及开火。其中一艘是悬挂印度国旗、载有200万桶伊拉克石油的超大型油轮（VLCC）。与此同时，印度仍在进口伊朗石油。有这样的朋友…… #OOTT #Tankers #IranWar 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇦 GOOD NEWS | Bell Textron announced plans to establish a subsidiary and open an office in Ukraine, focusing on long-term industrial cooperation. ▪️ This marks an initial step toward localizing helicopter production. ▪️ The new structure will support Bell’s current and future projects in Ukraine, including assembly, maintenance, and repair of helicopters. ▪️ The entity, named Bell Textron Ukraine, will serve as the company’s operational hub in the country, though its permanent location has not yet been determined. ▪️ “This is an important step toward building practical and mutually beneficial cooperation with Ukraine’s defense and industrial base,” said Jeffrey Schloesser, Bell’s Senior Vice President for Strategic Programs. ▪️ According to him, the company aims to establish a lasting presence in Ukraine to expand cooperation and ensure long-term growth. ▪️ Bell believes helicopters such as the AH-1Z Viper and UH-1Y Venom could strengthen Ukraine’s defense capabilities and form the basis of a durable industrial partnership. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231：❗️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇦 好消息 | 贝尔德事隆（Bell Textron）宣布计划在乌克兰设立子公司并开设办事处，专注于长期的工业合作。▪️ 这标志着迈向直升机本地化生产的第一步。▪️ 新机构将支持贝尔在乌克兰当前和未来的项目，包括直升机的组装、维护和维修。▪️ 该实体名为“贝尔德事隆乌克兰”，将作为该公司在乌克兰的运营中心，尽管其永久地点尚未确定。▪️ 贝尔战略项目高级副总裁杰弗里·施洛瑟表示：“这是与乌克兰国防和工业基础建立务实且互利合作的重要一步。”▪️ 据他称，该公司旨在在乌克兰建立持久存在，以扩大合作并确保长期增长。▪️ 贝尔认为，AH-1Z“蝰蛇”和UH-1Y“毒液”等直升机可以加强乌克兰的防御能力，并构成持久工业伙伴关系的基础。与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - At least 2 merchant vessels report they were hit by gunfire as they attempted to cross the Hormuz Strait, after Iran said it was reimposing military controls because the U.S. maintained its blockade of Iranian ports — Reuters tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息 - 至少有2艘商船报告称，在试图穿越霍尔木兹海峡时遭到枪击。此前伊朗表示，由于美国维持对伊朗港口的封锁，伊朗正在重新实施军事管制 —— 路透社推文

text: U.S. Central Command Littoral combat ship USS Canberra (LCS 30) patrols the Arabian Sea during the U.S. blockade. Since commencement of the blockade, 23 ships have complied with direction from U.S. forces to turn around. American forces are enforcing a maritime blockade against ships entering or exiting Iranian ports and coastal areas. tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部濒海战斗舰“堪培拉”号（LCS 30）在美国封锁期间在阿拉伯海巡逻。自封锁开始以来，已有23艘船只听从美军指示掉头离开。美军正在对进出伊朗港口和沿海地区的船只实施海上封锁。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 👀 🇺🇸 New images have emerged from U.S. Air Force tests of the FAMM-L (AGM-188A “Rusty Dagger”) small cruise missile, launched from an F-16D over the Gulf of Mexico. 🔹 The test marks a major shift in tactical aviation capabilities, as the U.S. moves closer to integrating a lightweight (~230 kg), low-cost, mass-producible missile with a reported range exceeding 900 km. 🔹 Developed under the ERAM (Extended Range Attack Munition) program — which may include deliveries to Ukraine — the AGM-188A approaches the performance of heavier systems like the JASSM-ER. 🔹 However, it is significantly more compact and up to 10 times cheaper, with an estimated unit cost of around $250,000 in serial production. 🔹 The key value of the “Rusty Dagger” lies in correcting the economic imbalance of modern warfare, where expensive precision munitions are often used against relatively low-cost targets. 🔹 Its smaller size and lower cost enable mass deployment in large salvos of hundreds of missiles, preserving stocks of more expensive strategic weapons. 🔹 For tactical aviation, this effectively extends strike range, allowing aircraft to hit distant, well-defended targets while staying outside enemy air defense zones. 🔹 The concept of such low-cost cruise missiles enables saturation of air defense systems while maintaining precision and effectiveness — a factor that could significantly reshape modern warfare dynamics. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231：👀 🇺🇸 美国空军测试FAMM-L（AGM-188A“锈匕首”）小型巡航导弹的新图像已经出现，该导弹由一架F-16D在墨西哥湾上空发射。🔹 这次测试标志着战术航空能力的重大转变，因为美国正接近整合一种轻型（约230公斤）、低成本、可大规模生产且据称射程超过900公里的导弹。🔹 该导弹在ERAM（远程攻击弹药）计划下开发——该计划可能包括向乌克兰交付——AGM-188A的性能接近JASSM-ER等更重型的系统。🔹 然而，它体积更小，成本最高可便宜10倍，批量生产的单价估计在25万美元左右。🔹 “锈匕首”的关键价值在于纠正现代战争的经济失衡，即昂贵的精确弹药往往被用于相对低成本的目标。🔹 其较小的尺寸和较低的成本使其能够大规模部署，一次齐射数百枚导弹，从而节省更昂贵的战略武器库存。🔹 对于战术航空而言，这有效地扩大了打击范围，使飞机能够在敌方防空区外打击遥远且防御严密的阵地。🔹 这种低成本巡航导弹的概念使得在保持精度和有效性的同时实现防空系统饱和成为可能——这一因素可能会显著重塑现代战争的动态。与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: WarTranslated Lavrov claims talks on Ukraine are not a priority and Russia is not pressuring anyone to negotiate, while welcoming a 'return to talks' in Istanbul. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045463639591632998/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 拉夫罗夫声称关于乌克兰的谈判不是优先事项，俄罗斯没有向任何人施压要求谈判，同时欢迎“回到伊斯坦布尔进行谈判”。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045463639591632998/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender The United Kingdom Maritime Trade Operations center has issued an advisory about activity in the Strait of Hormuz. The master of a tanker has reported being approached by 2 Iranian Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) gunboats, who then fired at the tanker. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2045463339598250181/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 英国海上贸易行动中心发布了关于霍尔木兹海峡活动的咨询。一艘油轮的船长报告称，两艘伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）炮艇靠近并向油轮开火。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2045463339598250181/photo/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 Iranian deputy foreign minister said Tehran is not ready for a new round of talks with Washington because the U.S. has not abandoned its hardline stance, and that Iran will not hand over enriched uranium to the United States. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iran’s deputy foreign minister said that after the Lebanon ceasefire, it was agreed to facilitate commercial passage through the Strait of Hormuz, but the United States disrupted the process. “The US said the strait is open for everyone except Iran. This was a violation of the ceasefire,” he stated. He added that the era of colonialism is over and Washington cannot impose its will on other nations. “War cannot have any positive outcome. Iran will defend itself as one of the world’s oldest civilisations,” he said, responding to U.S. President Trump’s threat to resume military action if no deal is reached by Wednesday. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 伊朗副外长表示，德黑兰尚未准备好与华盛顿进行新一轮谈判，因为美国没有放弃其强硬立场，且伊朗不会向美国移交浓缩铀。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗副外长表示，在黎巴嫩停火后，双方同意促进通过霍尔木兹海峡的商业通行，但美国破坏了这一进程。“美国说海峡对所有人开放，除了伊朗。这是对停火协议的违反，”他表示。他补充说，殖民主义时代已经结束，华盛顿不能将自己的意志强加给其他国家。“战争不可能有任何积极的结果。作为世界上最古老的文明之一，伊朗将捍卫自己，”他在回应美国总统特朗普关于如果周三前未达成协议将恢复军事行动的威胁时说道。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ ☀️ 🇮🇶 🇮🇷 Kurdistan Region of Iraq Prime Minister Masrour Barzani strongly condemned ongoing drone attacks against the region over the past several days. Despite not being part of the conflict and despite the ceasefire and peace talks, the attacks have killed at least five people and injured many more, in an effort to undermine the truce. Barzani called on Iraq’s federal government to take practical measures to end the attacks, and urged international partners to provide equipment to protect Kurdistan’s civilian and energy infrastructure. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ ☀️ 🇮🇶 🇮🇷 伊拉克库尔德斯坦地区总理马斯罗尔·巴尔扎尼强烈谴责过去几天针对该地区持续不断的无人机袭击。尽管该地区并未参与冲突，且尽管存在停火协议和和平谈判，但这些袭击已造成至少五人死亡，多人受伤，意在破坏停火。巴尔扎尼呼吁伊拉克联邦政府采取切实措施结束袭击，并敦促国际伙伴提供装备以保护库尔德斯坦的民用和能源基础设施。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇴🇲 A tanker was approached by two Iranian Revolutionary Guard gun boats 20 nautical miles north‑east of Oman. The boats fired on the vessel without issuing a VHF challenge. The tanker and crew are reported safe, and authorities are investigating. …" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ : The U.S. military is tracking Iranian attacks on two non‑US vessels, a senior US official said. According to the vessels’ masters, the Iranian boats did not issue a VHF radio challenge before opening fire. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇴🇲 一艘油轮在阿曼东北部20海里处遭到两艘伊朗革命卫队炮艇的靠近。这些船只在未发出VHF无线电警告的情况下向该船开火。据报道，油轮和船员均安全，当局正在调查。……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 《华尔街日报》：一名美国高级官员表示，美军正在追踪伊朗对两艘非美国船只的袭击。据船长称，伊朗船只在开火前未发出VHF无线电警告。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 Tasnim News Agency: Iran has not yet agreed to the next round of negotiations with the United States. Tehran cited U.S. President Trump’s announcement of a continued naval blockade on the Strait of Hormuz and “excessive demands” by the US in the talks.…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iranian deputy foreign minister said Tehran is not ready for a new round of talks with Washington because the U.S. has not abandoned its hardline stance, and that Iran will not hand over enriched uranium to the United States. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 塔斯尼姆通讯社：伊朗尚未同意与美国进行下一轮谈判。德黑兰援引美国总统特朗普关于继续对霍尔木兹海峡实施海军封锁的声明，以及美国在谈判中提出的‘过分要求’……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗副外长表示，德黑兰尚未准备好与华盛顿进行新一轮谈判，因为美国尚未放弃其强硬立场，且伊朗不会向美国移交浓缩铀。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 Approximately 20 ships that attempted to cross the Strait of Hormuz have turned back, following recent developments in the waterway. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇶 🇮🇳 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Al Jazeera: An Indian oil tanker carrying Iraqi crude has been stopped in the Strait of Hormuz since March. It attempted to exit after receiving permission but was shot at, a Basra Oil Company source told Al Jazeera. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 继近期水道局势发展后，约有20艘试图穿越霍尔木兹海峡的船只已折返。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇶 🇮🇳 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 半岛电视台：据巴士拉石油公司消息人士向半岛电视台透露，一艘载有伊拉克原油的印度油轮自3月起被困在霍尔木兹海峡。该船在获得许可后试图离开，但遭到射击。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇦 💥 Explosions in Sumy 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 💥 苏梅发生爆炸 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) UKMTO reports that two Iranian gunboats approached and fired upon a tanker around 20 nautical miles northeast of Oman, in the Strait of Hormuz, on Saturday. The tanker and crew are said to be safe. https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2045462197334069620/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）英国海上贸易行动办公室（UKMTO）报告称，周六在霍尔木兹海峡阿曼东北部约20海里处，两艘伊朗炮艇靠近并向一艘油轮开火。据称油轮和船员均安全。 https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2045462197334069620/photo/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @DeItaone : IRAN'S SUPREME LEADER MOJTABA KHAMENEI IN STATEMENT POSTED ON TELEGRAM CHANNEL: IRAN'S NAVY IS READY TO INFLICT 'NEW BITTER DEFEATS' ON ENEMIES tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）转发 @DeItaone：伊朗最高领袖莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊在Telegram频道发布的声明：伊朗海军已准备好对敌人造成‘新的惨痛失败’ 推文

text: WarTranslated SBU’s Alpha unit says it hit three Russian warships in occupied Crimea including the landing ships Yamal and Azov plus a third vessel. They also struck a Delfin comms node, a Mys-M1 radar and fuel tanks at the Yugtorsan oil depot, with a Grachonok likely hit too. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 乌克兰国家安全局（SBU）阿尔法特种部队称，他们击中了被占领的克里米亚的三艘俄罗斯军舰，包括“亚马尔”号和“亚速”号登陆舰以及第三艘船只。他们还打击了一个Delfin通信节点、一部Mys-M1雷达和Yugtorsan油库的燃料罐，Grachonok巡逻艇也可能被击中。 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @GloOouD : ❗️ According to intelligence data, roads are being built in the border areas of Belarus towards Ukrainian territory, and artillery positions are being set up. We believe that Russia will again try to drag Belarus into its war, — Zelenskyy https://twitter.com/GloOouD/status/2045196249389748710/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转发 @GloOouD：❗️ 根据情报数据，白俄罗斯边境地区正在修建通往乌克兰领土的道路，并正在部署炮兵阵地。我们认为俄罗斯将再次试图将白俄罗斯拖入其战争，——泽连斯基 https://twitter.com/GloOouD/status/2045196249389748710/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇷🇺 Russia’s so-called “import substitution” in drones appears largely nominal, with systems reportedly up to 90% dependent on Chinese components. 🔹 Ukrainian hackers gained access to a closed meeting of Russia’s Ministry of Industry and Trade focused on UAVs, where participants discussed their heavy reliance on China. 🔹 Engines, electronics, and batteries are almost entirely imported, while Russian firms are mainly assembling drones from ready-made parts. 🔹 If supplies from China were disrupted, production could potentially come to a complete halt. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231：🇷🇺 俄罗斯所谓的无人机“进口替代”似乎名存实亡，据报道其系统高达90%依赖中国零部件。🔹 乌克兰黑客获取了俄罗斯工业和贸易部关于无人机的闭门会议记录，参会者讨论了他们对中国的严重依赖。🔹 发动机、电子设备和电池几乎全部进口，而俄罗斯公司主要是在组装现成的无人机零件。🔹 如果来自中国的供应中断，生产可能会完全停滞。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz IRGC gunboats opened fire on tanker off of Oman's coast, UK maritime agency says. . The captain of the tanker said the two gunboats opened fire without issuing a radio challenge tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 英国海事机构称，伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队炮艇在阿曼海岸外向一艘油轮开火。油轮船长表示，两艘炮艇在未发出无线电警告的情况下开火。 推文

text: WarTranslated Lavrov calls patience Russia’s key trait and says it’s good no one knows where their red lines end. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045455989772567037/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 拉夫罗夫称耐心是俄罗斯的主要特质，并表示没人知道他们的红线在哪里是件好事。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045455989772567037/video/1 推文

text: The U.S. aircraft carrier USS Gerald R. Ford has entered the Red Sea, accompanied by two destroyers. Source: AP
text_zh: 美国“杰拉尔德·R·福特”号航空母舰已进入红海，并由两艘驱逐舰护航。来源：美联社

text: Commercial vessels are receiving radio messages from the Iranian Navy ordering the closure of the Strait of Hormuz and prohibiting any ship from passing. Source: Al Jazeera
text_zh: 商船正在收到伊朗海军的无线电信息，命令关闭霍尔木兹海峡并禁止任何船只通过。来源：半岛电视台

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The Israeli military said it carried out several strikes in southern Lebanon against alleged Hezbollah members who allegedly violated the "ceasefire understandings." Troops operating south of the “Yellow Line” identified alleged fighters who approached from north of the line, posing an immediate threat. The IDF said it is authorised to take self‑defence measures, which are not limited by the ceasefire, and will continue to clear the area under its control of alleged Hezbollah infrastructure and members. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列军方表示，在黎巴嫩南部对涉嫌违反“停火谅解”的真主党成员进行了多次打击。在“黄线”以南行动的部队发现了从线北靠近的涉嫌武装人员，构成了直接威胁。以色列国防军表示，其有权采取自卫措施，这些措施不受停火协议限制，并将继续清理其控制区内的涉嫌真主党基础设施和成员。 @wfwitness

text: 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 The topic of resuming negotiations on Ukraine is not a top priority. Russia is not imposing negotiations on anyone - Lavrov He noted that Russia views the possibility of resuming negotiations in Istanbul positively. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 恢复乌克兰谈判的话题并非当务之急。俄罗斯没有强迫任何人进行谈判——拉夫罗夫。他指出，俄罗斯对恢复伊斯坦布尔谈判的可能性持积极态度。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 BREAKING! UKMTO (United Kingdom Maritime Trade Operations) reports an incident in the Gulf of Oman. Two IRGC gunboats reportedly approached a tanker some 20 nautical miles northeast of Oman and opened fire without issuing any prior VHF warning. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 突发！英国海上贸易行动办公室（UKMTO）报告阿曼湾发生一起事件。据报道，两艘伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）炮艇在阿曼东北约20海里处接近一艘油轮，并在未发出任何预先VHF警告的情况下开火。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench 🇮🇷 🇮🇳 ⚡️ UKMTO Confirms: IRGC Gun Boats Approach and Fire on Tanker 20NM Northeast of Oman 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench 🇮🇷 🇮🇳 ⚡️ UKMTO确认：伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队炮艇在阿曼东北20海里处接近并向一艘油轮开火 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Iran’s army spokesman said that during the recent war, more than 40 strategic military targets of the "enemy" in Israel were struck using drones and short‑ and medium‑range missiles. The "enemy" never dared launch a ground invasion due to the high readiness of the army’s ground forces. The army’s executive deputy said Iran fought on at least twelve fronts, not only against the U.S. and Israel, and that the 40‑day war changed global military literature. A senior commander warned that the enemy must bury any thought of a ground attack on Iran’s borders, adding: “We monitor enemy positions and will respond with ground‑force missiles, air force, artillery and combat drones if any movement occurs.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 伊朗军队发言人表示，在最近的战争中，使用无人机以及短程和中程导弹打击了以色列境内40多个“敌人”的战略军事目标。由于陆军地面部队的高度戒备，敌人从未敢发动地面入侵。军队执行副司令表示，伊朗在至少十二条战线上作战，不仅是针对美国和以色列，而且这场为期40天的战争改变了全球军事文献。一位高级指挥官警告说，敌人必须打消任何对伊朗边境进行地面攻击的念头，并补充道：“我们正在监视敌人的阵地，如果发生任何动向，我们将以地面部队导弹、空军、炮兵和战斗无人机进行回击。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei, in an Army Day message, said the Islamic Revolution ended the era of imposed weakness on the armed forces. He praised the army for its recent heroism in defending Iran’s soil and flag alongside other branches, confronting the U.S. and Israel. He highlighted the air force’s drones striking "American and Zionist criminals," and the navy’s readiness to inflict new defeats. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 伊朗最高领袖阿亚图拉·穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊在建军节致辞中表示，伊斯兰革命结束了武装部队被强加的软弱时代。他赞扬了军队最近在保卫伊朗领土和旗帜方面与其它军种并肩作战，对抗美国和以色列的英勇表现。他强调了空军无人机打击了“美国和犹太复国主义罪犯”，以及海军准备给予敌人新的失败。 @wfwitness

text: Iran’s Deputy Foreign Minister Saeed Khatibzadeh: Trump talks too much.
text_zh: 伊朗副外长赛义德·哈提卜扎德：特朗普话太多了。

text: Iran has not agreed to the next round of talks with the U.S. yet, citing U.S. pressure (including Trump’s naval blockade statement) and what it calls unreasonable demands. Iran says it will only continue negotiations if those demands stop, and has sent this message via a Pakistani intermediary. Source: Tasnim
text_zh: 伊朗尚未同意与美国进行下一轮会谈，理由是美国的压力（包括特朗普关于海上封锁的声明）以及所谓的无理要求。伊朗表示，只有在这些要求停止的情况下才会继续谈判，并已通过巴基斯坦中间人传达了这一信息。来源：塔斯尼姆通讯社

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Approximately 20 ships that attempted to cross the Strait of Hormuz have turned back, following recent developments in the waterway. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 继近期水道局势发展后，约20艘试图穿越霍尔木兹海峡的船只已掉头返回。 @wfwitness

text: Iran’s Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei: Iran's valiant navy is ready to inflict new bitter defeats on its enemies.
text_zh: 伊朗最高领袖穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊：伊朗英勇的海军已准备好给敌人带来新的惨痛失败。

text: Burkina Faso Dissolves 118 Groups in Biggest NGO Purge Yet Burkina Faso: Ibrahim Traore's government dissolved 118 NGOs on Saturday, tightening control over civil society amid ongoing conflict & governance shifts. The move has drawn criticism from Amnesty International, calling it a flagrant attack on "right to freedom of association." READ MORE
text_zh: 布基纳法索解散118个组织，为迄今最大规模的非政府组织清洗。布基纳法索：易卜拉欣·特拉奥雷政府周六解散了118个非政府组织，在持续的冲突和治理变革中加强了对公民社会的控制。此举招致国际特赦组织的批评，称其为对“结社自由权”的公然攻击。阅读更多

text: BREAKING: A tanker about 20 nautical miles northeast of Oman was approached by two IRGC gunboats, which opened fire without issuing a VHF warning; the vessel and crew are safe.
text_zh: 突发：两艘伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队炮艇在阿曼东北约20海里处接近一艘油轮，并在未发出VHF警告的情况下开火；船只和船员安全。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇴🇲 A tanker was approached by two Iranian Revolutionary Guard gun boats 20 nautical miles north‑east of Oman. The boats fired on the vessel without issuing a VHF challenge. The tanker and crew are reported safe, and authorities are investigating. At least two merchant vessels have reported being hit by gunfire while attempting to cross the Strait of Hormuz. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇴🇲 两艘伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队炮艇在阿曼东北20海里处接近一艘油轮。这些船只在未发出VHF挑战的情况下向该船开火。据报道，油轮和船员安全，当局正在调查。至少有两艘商船报告在试图穿越霍尔木兹海峡时遭到枪击。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench 🇮🇷 🇮🇳 ⚡️ According to TankerTrackers.com , two Channel 16 (the international VHF marine radio) audio recordings captured today confirm that this two Indian-flagged vessels were forced back west out of the Strait of Hormuz by Iran's Sepah (IRGC) Navy, with firing involved. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench 🇮🇷 🇮🇳 ⚡️ 根据 TankerTrackers.com 的消息，今天捕获的两段16频道（国际VHF海上无线电）音频记录证实，这两艘悬挂印度国旗的船只被伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）海军强行赶出霍尔木兹海峡以西，过程中涉及开火。🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇷🇺 "God Endured, and So Must We - But No One Knows Where That Red Line Is" Russian Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov warns against those dismissing Russia as a "paper tiger." Russia has patience, he says, but that patience has limits. And the fact that no one knows exactly where the red line is - that, in his words, is a feature, not a flaw. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 “上帝在忍耐，我们也必须忍耐——但没人知道那条红线在哪里” 俄罗斯外交部长谢尔盖·拉夫罗夫警告那些将俄罗斯视为“纸老虎”的人。他说，俄罗斯有耐心，但这种耐心是有限度的。而且，没人确切知道红线在哪里——用他的话来说，这是一种策略，而不是缺陷。🔴 @DDGeopolitics
